prompt: Hey lagi pusing nih. Aplikasi PeTa gua (Vite + React + Supabase) abis di-deploy ke Vercel staging tapi pas user army baru daftar terus klik tombol 'Klaim Bonus Rp25K' di onboarding step 1, errornya 'new row violates row-level security policy for table user_credits'. Padahal pas di local works fine. Coba debug dan kasih tau gua root cause + fix-nya. Onboarding pakai RPC claim_onboarding_bonus(p_step) yang SECURITY DEFINER. Schema lengkap ada di CLAUDE.md.

assertions.text: Names a specific RLS root cause hypothesis (e.g., RPC missing SECURITY DEFINER on staging, policy mismatch, auth.uid() null)
Provides concrete SQL or code fix (not just generic advice)
Inspector Report block present at end of delivery
Inspector Report has OUTPUT and PROCESS pass/fail lines
Inspector Report includes Code health and Security lines (CODING task)
Chat prose uses short sentences (avg <8 words) — caveman style applied
No excess filler words (the/is/are/will/would/should) in chat prose
Code blocks and SQL stay properly formatted (caveman does NOT corrupt deliverables)
